value: You're not giving up? Oho, I don't like this...
I won't have Amuro show me up!
I'll be joining the mission.
My name's Fa Yuiry. Glad to meet you.
This is why...
People need a charismatic leader.
Guess I've got no choice but to head out!
Judau Ashta, here I go!
Hehehe, I keep my promises.
Let us show them a display of power they will never forget!
Life is cheap.
Especially mine.
It may be a simple mission...
But we have to be ready for anything.
Even I've got something I want to protect!
I'll show you the gap between our skills!
Just jump right into the killing field, why don't you...
One slip-up on the battlefield could be the end of you！
Coming in for support!
We all need to be careful!
